docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,500.00 FILED BY ALLIED TEMPORARIES INC AS TO DEFENDANT COOK, WALTER, ESQ.  L O OF JOSEPH O'SULLIVAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-08-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT COOK, WALTER, ESQ.  L O OF JOSEPH O'SULLIVAN
MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION OF 10/15/92 FILED BY PLAINTIFF IS DENIED, BY JUDGE DESMOND IN DEPT. 1, AT 9:00 AM.
TRIAL RESET TO MAY-18-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08 TRIAL OF MAY-08-1992 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALLIED TEMPORARIES INC IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT COOK, WALTER, ESQ.  L O OF JOSEPH O'SULLIVAN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
